math-2.mathml:
<m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>SiH</m:mtext><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:msub></m:mtd></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:mtext>Si: 4 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>H: 1 valence electron/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>4 atoms</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="16.0em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>8 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
math-2.latex: \begin{aligned} \\ \, {\text{SiH}}_{4} \\ \, \text{Si: 4 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=4 \\ {+\, \text{H: 1 valence electron/atom}\, \times \, \text{4 atoms}=4}¯ \\ \\ \, =\text{8 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

math-3.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.5em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>CHO</m:mtext><m:mn>2</m:mn></m:msub><m:msup><m:mrow/><m:mtext>−</m:mtext></m:msup></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.48em"/><m:mtext>C: 4 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:mtext>H: 1 valence electron/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>1</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.05em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>2 atoms</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>12</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="6.5em"/><m:mtext>1 additional electron</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>1</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="15.50em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>18 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
math-3.latex: \begin{aligned} \\ \, {\text{CHO}}_{2}^{\text{−}} \\ \, \text{C: 4 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=4 \\ \, \text{H: 1 valence electron/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=1 \\ \, \text{O: 6 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{2 atoms}=12 \\ {+\, \text{1 additional electron}=1}¯ \\ \\ \, =\text{18 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

math-5.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr/><m:mtr/><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.1em"/><m:msup><m:mtext>NO</m:mtext><m:mo>+</m:mo></m:msup></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mtext>N: 5 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>5</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.4em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electron/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>6</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.35em"/><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.5em"/><m:mtext>−1 electron (positive charge)</m:mtext><m:mspace width="1.8em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>−1</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="15.02em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>10 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
math-5.latex: \begin{aligned} \, {\text{NO}}^{+} \\ \text{N: 5 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=5 \\ \\ \, \text{O: 6 valence electron/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=6 \\ \, {+\, \text{−1 electron (positive charge)}\, =−1}¯ \\ \\ \, =\text{10 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

math-6.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>OF</m:mtext><m:mtext>2</m:mtext></m:msub></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="1.25em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>6</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.1em"/><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>F: 7 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>2 atoms</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>14</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="16.28em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>20 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
math-6.latex: \begin{aligned} \\ \, {\text{OF}}_{\text{2}} \\ \, \text{O: 6 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=6 \\ \, {+\, \text{F: 7 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{2 atoms}=14}¯ \\ \, =\text{20 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

fs-idm31186656.mathml:
<m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>SiH</m:mtext><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:msub></m:mtd></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:mtext>Si: 4 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr>

<m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr>
<m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="16.0em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>8 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>

fs-idm69212352.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.5em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>CHO</m:mtext><m:mn>2</m:mn></m:msub><m:msup><m:mrow/><m:mtext>−</m:mtext></m:msup></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.48em"/><m:mtext>C: 4 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>4</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:mtext>H: 1 valence electron/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>1</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.05em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>2 atoms</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>12</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="6.5em"/><m:mtext>1 additional electron</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>1</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="15.50em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>18 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
fs-idm69212352.latex: \begin{aligned} \\ \, {\text{CHO}}_{2}^{\text{−}} \\ \, \text{C: 4 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=4 \\ \, \text{H: 1 valence electron/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=1 \\ \, \text{O: 6 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{2 atoms}=12 \\ {+\, \text{1 additional electron}=1}¯ \\ \\ \, =\text{18 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

fs-idm16450944.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr/><m:mtr/><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.1em"/><m:msup><m:mtext>NO</m:mtext><m:mo>+</m:mo></m:msup></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mtext>N: 5 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>5</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.4em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electron/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>6</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.35em"/><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.5em"/><m:mtext>−1 electron (positive charge)</m:mtext><m:mspace width="1.8em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>−1</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="15.02em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>10 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
fs-idm16450944.latex: \begin{aligned} \, {\text{NO}}^{+} \\ \text{N: 5 valence electrons/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=5 \\ \\ \, \text{O: 6 valence electron/atom}\, \times \, \text{1 atom}=6 \\ \, {+\, \text{−1 electron (positive charge)}\, =−1}¯ \\ \\ \, =\text{10 valence electrons} \end{aligned}

fs-idm18474448.mathml: <m:math><m:mtable columnalign="left"><m:mtr><m:mtd/></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.8em"/><m:msub><m:mtext>OF</m:mtext><m:mtext>2</m:mtext></m:msub></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="1.25em"/><m:mtext>O: 6 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>1 atom</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>6</m:mn></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="0.1em"/><m:munder accentunder="true"><m:mrow><m:mo>+</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>F: 7 valence electrons/atom</m:mtext><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mo>×</m:mo><m:mspace width="0.2em"/><m:mtext>2 atoms</m:mtext><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mn>14</m:mn></m:mrow><m:mo stretchy="true">¯</m:mo></m:munder></m:mtd></m:mtr><m:mtr><m:mtd><m:mspace width="16.28em"/><m:mo>=</m:mo><m:mtext>20 valence electrons</m:mtext></m:mtd></m:mtr></m:mtable></m:math>
